description: Alexis Ohanian discusses his journey with Reddit, the evolution of the Internet, and the potential of decentralized technology. He announces a $50 million investment in social projects built on Solana, emphasizing the importance of community and connection.
topic_summary: In this episode, Alexis Ohanian shares insights on building technology for connection, the impact of Reddit, and his new venture fund's collaboration with the Solana Foundation to invest in innovative social platforms [t=146.39].
